name: IR/Raman Phase Finder
summary: Add Finder-style plot navigation: rectangle zoom, X-axis wheel zoom and double-click full-range reset.
Add an expanded plot context menu with export, full-range and layer visibility controls.
Fix the Windows desktop shortcut name so it is created directly on the Desktop.
Use the shared Sci runtime and AppData layout for clean installation.
Reduce Windows Defender false-positive risk by removing the VBS launcher and ExecutionPolicy Bypass usage.
